posts.title: Text Labeling and Image Resolution with the Monkey Chat Vision Model and DigitalOcean+Paperspace GPUs 🐒
posts.summary: The Monkey Vision model, when combined with DigitalOcean + Paperspace's cloud GPUs, excels in generating detailed image captions and analyzing images through the Monkey Chat Vision model.
posts.author: Shaoni Mukherjee

posts.title: Understanding Adversarial Attacks Using Fast Gradient Sign Method
posts.summary: In this tutorial, we use Gradio to examine adversarial attacks and their potential for misdirecting models towards making inaccurate predictions.
posts.author: Adrien Payong
